title.en: Twenty-Two Seconds at a Red Light
title.tr: Twenty-Two Seconds at a Red Light
title.ar: Twenty-Two Seconds at a Red Light

story.ru: Я остановился на красный сигнал и простоял около двадцати секунд, когда сзади в мою машину въехал седан. У меня диагностировали хлыстовую травму шеи, повреждены бампер и фонарь. Прошу оплатить лечение и ремонт.
story.en: I stopped at a red light and had been stationary for about twenty seconds when a sedan struck my car from behind. I was diagnosed with whiplash, and my bumper and tail light were damaged. I am claiming the cost of treatment and repairs.
story.tr: I stopped at a red light and had been stationary for about twenty seconds when a sedan struck my car from behind. I was diagnosed with whiplash, and my bumper and tail light were damaged. I am claiming the cost of treatment and repairs.
story.ar: I stopped at a red light and had been stationary for about twenty seconds when a sedan struck my car from behind. I was diagnosed with whiplash, and my bumper and tail light were damaged. I am claiming the cost of treatment and repairs.
story.kk: Я остановился на красный сигнал и простоял около двадцати секунд, когда сзади в мою машину въехал седан. У меня диагностировали хлыстовую травму шеи, повреждены бампер и фонарь. Прошу оплатить лечение и ремонт.

content.ru: Автомобиль Феррейры полностью остановлен у стоп-линии. Через двадцать две секунды сзади приближается седан без торможения и происходит удар.
content.en: Ferreira's car is completely stationary at the stop line. Twenty-two seconds later, a sedan approaches from behind without braking and strikes it.
content.tr: Ferreira's car is completely stationary at the stop line. Twenty-two seconds later, a sedan approaches from behind without braking and strikes it.
content.ar: Ferreira's car is completely stationary at the stop line. Twenty-two seconds later, a sedan approaches from behind without braking and strikes it.
content.kk: Автомобиль Феррейры полностью остановлен у стоп-линии. Через двадцать две секунды сзади приближается седан без торможения и происходит удар.

contradictionExplanation.ru: Видео подтверждает, что заявитель стоял и не создавал аварийную ситуацию.
contradictionExplanation.en: The footage confirms that the claimant was stationary and did not create a hazard.
contradictionExplanation.tr: The footage confirms that the claimant was stationary and did not create a hazard.
contradictionExplanation.ar: The footage confirms that the claimant was stationary and did not create a hazard.
contradictionExplanation.kk: Видео подтверждает, что заявитель стоял и не создавал аварийную ситуацию.

reason.ru: Видео подтверждает, что заявитель стоял и не создавал аварийную ситуацию.
reason.en: The footage confirms that the claimant was stationary and did not create a hazard.
reason.tr: The footage confirms that the claimant was stationary and did not create a hazard.
reason.ar: The footage confirms that the claimant was stationary and did not create a hazard.
reason.kk: Видео подтверждает, что заявитель стоял и не создавал аварийную ситуацию.

content.ru: Через 67 минут после ДТП зафиксированы боль в шее, ограничение подвижности и растяжение связок. Повреждения соответствуют резкому удару сзади.
content.en: Sixty-seven minutes after the collision, doctors recorded neck pain, restricted movement, and a ligament strain. The injuries are consistent with a sudden rear impact.
content.tr: Sixty-seven minutes after the collision, doctors recorded neck pain, restricted movement, and a ligament strain. The injuries are consistent with a sudden rear impact.
content.ar: Sixty-seven minutes after the collision, doctors recorded neck pain, restricted movement, and a ligament strain. The injuries are consistent with a sudden rear impact.
content.kk: Через 67 минут после ДТП зафиксированы боль в шее, ограничение подвижности и растяжение связок. Повреждения соответствуют резкому удару сзади.

contradictionExplanation.ru: Время обращения и механизм травмы совпадают с аварией.
contradictionExplanation.en: The timing and mechanism of the injury match the collision.
contradictionExplanation.tr: The timing and mechanism of the injury match the collision.
contradictionExplanation.ar: The timing and mechanism of the injury match the collision.
contradictionExplanation.kk: Время обращения и механизм травмы совпадают с аварией.

reason.ru: Время обращения и механизм травмы совпадают с аварией.
reason.en: The timing and mechanism of the injury match the collision.
reason.tr: The timing and mechanism of the injury match the collision.
reason.ar: The timing and mechanism of the injury match the collision.
reason.kk: Время обращения и механизм травмы совпадают с аварией.

content.ru: Второй водитель признал, что отвлёкся на навигатор. Тормозной путь перед машиной Феррейры отсутствует. Вина возложена на водителя седана.
content.en: The other driver admitted being distracted by the navigation system. There are no braking marks before Ferreira's car. The sedan driver was found at fault.
content.tr: The other driver admitted being distracted by the navigation system. There are no braking marks before Ferreira's car. The sedan driver was found at fault.
content.ar: The other driver admitted being distracted by the navigation system. There are no braking marks before Ferreira's car. The sedan driver was found at fault.
content.kk: Второй водитель признал, что отвлёкся на навигатор. Тормозной путь перед машиной Феррейры отсутствует. Вина возложена на водителя седана.

contradictionExplanation.ru: Независимый протокол подтверждает обстоятельства и виновника.
contradictionExplanation.en: The independent report confirms both the circumstances and the at-fault driver.
contradictionExplanation.tr: The independent report confirms both the circumstances and the at-fault driver.
contradictionExplanation.ar: The independent report confirms both the circumstances and the at-fault driver.
contradictionExplanation.kk: Независимый протокол подтверждает обстоятельства и виновника.

reason.en: The independent report confirms both the circumstances and the at-fault driver.

content.ru: Брат заявителя приехал через двадцать минут после звонка. Он описал свежие повреждения, состояние Матеуса и присутствие второго водителя и полиции.
content.en: The claimant's brother arrived twenty minutes after receiving a call. He described the fresh damage, Mateus's condition, and the presence of the other driver and police.
content.tr: The claimant's brother arrived twenty minutes after receiving a call. He described the fresh damage, Mateus's condition, and the presence of the other driver and police.
content.ar: The claimant's brother arrived twenty minutes after receiving a call. He described the fresh damage, Mateus's condition, and the presence of the other driver and police.

contradictionExplanation.ru: Показания согласуются с записью и документами. Лукас впервые появляется в кампании как нейтральный свидетель.
contradictionExplanation.en: His statement matches the footage and documents. Lucas first appears in the campaign as a neutral witness.

ru: Запись показывает неподвижный автомобиль и удар сзади.
Медицинские документы, протокол и свидетель совпадают по времени и обстоятельствам.
Заявление полностью подтверждено. Выплату следует одобрить.
en: The footage confirms that the claimant was stationary and did not create a hazard.
The timing and mechanism of the injury match the collision.
The independent report confirms both the circumstances and the at-fault driver.
His statement matches the footage and documents. Lucas first appears in the campaign as a neutral witness.
No material statement has been disproven. The claim should be approved.

text.en: Mateus's car was stationary at a red light when it was struck from behind.
text.tr: Mateus's car was stationary at a red light when it was struck from behind.

preBrief.ru: После двух отказов легко начать видеть ложь в каждом заявлении. Это профессиональная деформация, а не талант. — В. Лебедева
preBrief.en: After two rejected claims, it is easy to start seeing lies everywhere. That is professional bias, not talent. — V. Lebedeva
preBrief.tr: After two rejected claims, it is easy to start seeing lies everywhere. That is professional bias, not talent. — V. Lebedeva
preBrief.ar: After two rejected claims, it is easy to start seeing lies everywhere. That is professional bias, not talent. — V. Lebedeva

postVerdictNote.ru: Иногда лучший результат расследования — не найти ложь там, где её нет. Свидетель Лукас Феррейра внесён в материалы дела.
postVerdictNote.en: Sometimes the best outcome is not finding a lie where none exists. Witness Lucas Ferreira has been entered into the case record.
postVerdictNote.tr: Sometimes the best outcome is not finding a lie where none exists. Witness Lucas Ferreira has been entered into the case record.
postVerdictNote.ar: Sometimes the best outcome is not finding a lie where none exists. Witness Lucas Ferreira has been entered into the case record.

nextCaseTeaser.ru: В следующем доме замки целы, сигнализация снята правильным кодом, а драгоценности всё равно исчезли.
nextCaseTeaser.en: At the next house, the locks are intact, the alarm was disarmed with the correct code, and the jewelry still vanished.
